name: accounting firms managing 10–20 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 clients/month, manual reconciliation causes financial discrepancies. We automate bank statement reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate bank reconciliations leading to financial discrepancies.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate bank reconciliations leading to financial discrepancies.
